tests
coverage.spec.ts
verify Yellow ( #f1c40f ) is applied as the background color
verify Red ( #e74c3c ) is applied as the background color
verify language switcher changes document language
handle initial fetch error
handle initial fetch with empty data
handle color selection fetch error
handle color response missing hex property
check Turquoise ( #1abc9c) is the default background color.
verify Turquoise ( #1abc9c ) is applied as the background color
data-driven.spec.ts
changing color to Turquoise should reflect in UI and DOM
changing color to Red should reflect in UI and DOM
changing color to Yellow should reflect in UI and DOM
error-handling.spec.ts
should handle fetch colors network failure gracefully
should handle color click network failure gracefully
should show loading state when API returns empty colors
network-mocking.spec.ts
should handle missing image gracefully by showing alt text
should display colors that do not exist in the database
should gracefully handle a color not found in the database
hybrid.spec.ts
should create color via API and verify through UI
pom-refactored.spec.ts
verify Turquoise ( #1abc9c ) is applied as the background color
verify Red ( #e74c3c ) is applied as the background color
verify Yellow ( #f1c40f ) is applied as the background color
color-management.spec.ts
shows a chip for each color with a swatch, name, and delete button
first color chip is active on load (aria-pressed=true)
clicking a chip makes it active
clicking "+ Add color" opens the picker modal
Cancel button closes the picker
close (×) button closes the picker
clicking the backdrop closes the picker
successfully adds a new color and shows its chip
shows client-side "Name is required" when submitting empty name
shows client-side validation error for invalid name chars
shows 409 duplicate error from server inside the picker
shows server-error message on 500 inside the picker
chip-x click opens confirm dialog with color name
cancel in confirm dialog closes it without deleting
Escape key closes the confirm dialog
successful delete removes the chip
deleting the active color switches background to the first remaining
delete API error shows alert banner
api.spec.ts
should delete an existing color
should return 404 for non-existent color deletion
GET /api/colors/Turquoise should return the correct hex code
GET /api/colors/Red should return the correct hex code
GET /api/colors/Yellow should return the correct hex code
GET /api/colors should return all colors
GET /api/colors/:name should return 404 for non-existent color
should create a new color with valid schema
should return 409 for duplicate color creation
should reject missing name
should reject empty name
should reject missing hex
should reject invalid hex format
should update a color with valid schema
should reject invalid hex format on update
should reject updating with empty name
should reject omitting both name and hex on update
should return 404 when updating non-existent color
security.spec.ts
POST with HTML tag in name is rejected (400)
POST with script tag in name is rejected (400)
POST with javascript: URI in name is rejected (400)
color names rendered in the UI do not trigger script execution
NoSQL injection object in name is rejected (400)
NoSQL $where operator in name is rejected (400)
SQL injection characters in name are rejected (400)
NoSQL operator in GET path param is rejected (400 or 404)
unknown extra fields in POST body are rejected (400)
oversized payload is rejected (413)
malformed JSON body returns 400
empty body on POST returns 400
array body on POST returns 400
X-Powered-By header is not exposed
error responses return JSON, not HTML (no info leakage)
PATCH /api/colors returns 405
DELETE /api/colors (collection) returns 405
PATCH /api/colors/:name returns 405
POST /api-docs returns 405
PUT /openapi.json returns 405
